name: Groundhopper
description: Armed with a notepad, a tragic anorak, and a severe lack of social skills. Excellent for exploring the map and finding neutral pubs before the opposition does.

name: Proper Hardman
description: Your frontline brawler. Wears Stone Island, doesn't feel the cold, and will two-foot an opposition scout without a second thought.

name: The Gaffer
description: Stands on the touchline screaming at the top of his lungs. Gives a massive combat boost to any Hardmen within 5 tiles. If he gets captured, you're effectively sacked.

name: Laptop Guru
description: Never played the game professionally, but he's got an iPad full of xG stats. Pings the opposition from afar with confusing tactical adjustments.

name: Away Day Coach
description: Smells like stale lager and pure despair. Essential for battering down the walls of the opposition's Fortress without your boys suffering from travel sickness.

name: First-Team Scout
description: Sneaks into rival training grounds to steal Tactical Knowledge or sabotage their Burger Vans. A proper sneaky prick.
